cases.description: descriptorCid is the CIDv1 of the DAG-CBOR encoding of the RecordsWrite descriptor object. Descriptor reused from fixtures/dwn/messages/basic-interface-messages.json (records-write-basic).

verification.tool: pure-Python DAG-CBOR encoder (length-first canonical map key order) + sha2-256 + CIDv1 + base32, implemented directly from the multiformats spec, NOT via the Rust impl
verification.note: Literal independently reproduced from the spec algorithm; the harness asserts the impl's compute_cid(descriptor) equals this literal (no tautology — the literal is not recomputed by the impl on the expected side).
